name: Cucumber and Avocado Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the cucumber paper-thin.
2. Season with salt, chili pepper, and lime juice.
3. Sprinkle with onion and red pepper slices.
4. Arrange lettuce on 6 serving plates.
5. Pile cucumber mixture in the center of each plate.
6. Add avocado slices and parsley.
6 servings.
